headline: Top S&P500 movers in Wednesday's session
summary: Let's have a look at what is happening on the US markets one hour before the close of the markets on Wednesday. Below you can find the top S&P500 gainers and losers in today's session.

headline: QatarEnergy Expands South America Push With Uruguay Offshore Entry
summary: QatarEnergy has acquired stakes in three offshore exploration blocks in Uruguay, marking its first upstream entry into the South American nation.

raw.headline: QatarEnergy Expands South America Push With Uruguay Offshore Entry
